de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.util

Class TermHelper

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.util.TermHelper

  • public class TermHelper
extends Object
    Provides some helper methods used by classes outside the logic package Please be careful with putting things here. This class has been mainly created to give getMaxSort a home which is scheduled to become obsolete soon (see method comment)

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Modifier Constructor and Description
      private TermHelper() 

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static Sort getMaxSort(Term term, int i, TermServices services)
      helper function to determine the maximal sort the term tSub may have as i sub term This method will become obsolete in the near future as all operators will become a fixed signature.
      private static Sort getMaxSortHelper(Operator op, int i, Sort maxSortDefault, TermServices services)

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

      • TermHelper

        private TermHelper()

    • Method Detail

      • getMaxSort

        public static Sort getMaxSort(Term term,
              int i,
              TermServices services)
        helper function to determine the maximal sort the term tSub may have as i sub term This method will become obsolete in the near future as all operators will become a fixed signature. But currently there ar eto many chnages pending (new sort hierarchy for integers, new pos) that much of the work would be for made new. That is the reason for this HACK
        Parameters:
        term - the Term of which a part of the i-th sub term may be replaced
        i - an int giving the position of sub term of which a part is to be replaced
        services - the Services object
        Returns:
        the maximal sort allowed at the i-th position

      • getMaxSortHelper

        private static Sort getMaxSortHelper(Operator op,
                    int i,
                    Sort maxSortDefault,
                    TermServices services)
        Parameters:
        op - the Operator whose argument sorts are to be determined
        i - the arguments position
        maxSortDefault - if argument sort cannot be determined
        services - the Services object
        Returns:
        the maximal sort allowed at argument i
